/usr/bin/ar qc libminisheet_core.a CMakeFiles/minisheet_core.dir/src/m1_types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minisheet_core.dir/src/m2_workbook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minisheet_core.dir/src/m3_display.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minisheet_core.dir/src/m4_formula.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minisheet_core.dir/src/m5_recalc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minisheet_core.dir/src/m6_storage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minisheet_core.dir/src/m7_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/minisheet_core.dir/third_party/tinyexpr/tinyexpr.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libminisheet_core.a
